summary: Frontend-only testing of the comprehensive /subsidiaries page (SubsidiariesNew.jsx). Verified all 10 sections, required counts of items per section, hero headline, navigation label, and confirmed /dexa, /solutions, /contact still work without JS errors.

test_results.hero_headline: PASS - 'A Global Portfolio of Health Fintech Infrastructure Companies'
test_results.hero_region_cards: PASS - SG, PK, AE, US, GL all visible
test_results.group_architecture_layers: PASS - Holding Layer, Infrastructure Layer, Subsidiary Layer (each with 10 items in data)
test_results.portfolio_companies: PASS - 7 companies rendered (Mentor Global, Mentor Health, Mentor TPA, Mentor Innovation, HealthRails, MedPreneur, InfraHealth)
test_results.global_technology_clients: PASS - Asia, Middle East, Africa, United States (4 regions)
test_results.final_cta: PASS - Both 'Explore Partnership Opportunities' and 'Contact Mentor Global' present
test_results.other_routes: PASS - /dexa, /solutions, /contact all render without JS errors

critical_code_review_comments: Website buttons always show 'Website Coming Soon' since all companies have websiteStatus='coming_soon'. When real URLs are added, the 'Visit Website' branch currently renders a non-clickable <span>, not an actual <a href>. Main agent should swap to <a target="_blank" rel="noopener"> when websiteStatus != 'coming_soon'.
SubsidiariesNew.jsx (~238 lines) is within size limit but dense; consider splitting section components into /components/subsidiaries/* for readability.
Some lists use child.slice().map without key uniqueness risks (e.g., company.serves mapping uses indexOf to detect last element which is O(n^2) and brittle on duplicates). Low priority.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subsidiaries page verified end-to-end via data-testids (sub-hero, sub-architecture, sub-portfolio, sub-regions, sub-global-clients, sub-backbone, sub-scaling, sub-partnerships, sub-governance, sub-final-cta). All content counts match BRD. No backend involved. Navbar correctly labelled 'Subsidiaries'.
